title: ProDec Combination Shavehook for Removing Paint and Varnish From Flat and Irregular Surfaces
features: Trade quality combination shavehook for stripping and scraping paint, varnish and adhesives from flat, contoured and rounded surfaces
Rust-resistant 2mm thick ground steel blade with 4 edges: long and short straight, concave and convex
Ideal for skirting boards, architraves, doors, furniture, coving, window frames, panels, pipes, mouldings and more
115mm (4.5") rugged steel shaft for heavy duty scraping
Ergonomically shaped premium quality varnished rosewood handle that minimises heat transfer when using a blowtorch
MORE INFORMATION BELOW in the 'From The Manufacturer' section - click on 'See More Product Details' or scroll down
description: From the manufacturer ProDec is the UK's most widely distributed brand of trade decorating accessories, so whether you're a seasoned pro, enthusiastic DIYer or even a beginner, we've got everything you need for a great finish - just add paint Shavehooks - power up your preparation Proper surface preparation before painting or varnishing is critical to getting good adhesion and avoiding cracking and flaking, and professionals know the value of investing time in doing it properly to give a good surface 'key' for a long lasting finish. Shavehooks are an essential decorator's tool when it comes to stripping and scraping paint, varnish and adhesives ahead of painting. This trade quality combination shavehook has 4 different edges suitable for a wide range of flat, profiled and rounded surfaces such as skirting boards, architraves, doors, furniture, coving, window frames, panels, pipes, mouldings and more. The points also enable it to rake into tight spots such as corner joints, and nooks and crannies such as tongue and groove panels. Made from rust-resistant, heavy duty 2mm thick ground steel, the contoured blade features long and short straight edges and concave and convex profiles, mounted onto a 115mm (4.5") rugged steel shaft, enabling heavy duty scraping for fast, efficient results and also ensuring your hand is not too close to heat if you're using a blowtorch to help strip coatings. The premium quality varnished rosewood handle is shaped for comfort to fit neatly into the palm of your hand and reduce hand fatigue and also minimises heat transfer when using a blowtorch. It also features a hanging hole for storage. Handy hint: After repeated use the blade can be filed if required to sharpen the edges and extend the tool's lifetime. Scraping solutions from ProDec For most people, preparation is the most arduous stage of any job, but pros will tell you that doing it properly is absolutely critical to getting a long lasting finish. Whether you're scraping or raking, need a little leverage or some heavy duty muscle, ProDec has a range of scrapers to help you get your surface in tiptop condition ready for the next stage of the job. Titan 6" heavy duty scraper The daddy of them all, the 6" Titan features double thickness blades set into a cast steel head, a 20" long, 1" diameter shaft and twin soft grips for double handed action to deliver brute force scraping and power through even the toughest jobs. Titan 4" heavy duty scraper The 4" Titan may be smaller for single handed scraping, but still packs a heavyweight punch, with the same double thickness blade specification as its bigger brother. Heavy duty scrapers A range of 4" and 6" blade scrapers mounted onto a die cast head for heavy duty scraping. Long, medium and short handle versions available for a range of stripping tasks. Rosewood scrapers Durable, hardened stainless steel blade with full tang that has deliberately limited flexibility to enable it to remove lumps and other difficult to remove material without bending. Mounted onto a premium rosewood handle that minimises heat transfer with a blowtorch. Duragrip scrapers Durable, hardened stainless steel blade with full tang that has deliberately limited flexibility to enable it to remove lumps and other difficult to remove material without bending. Mounted onto a rugged soft grip handle with pound through end to quickly and efficiently hammer nails, tacks, etc. Extension pole scrapers Designed to be mounted onto any standard screw fit extension pole to generate additional power and enable even the most difficult places to be reached without ladders or platforms. Heat treated high carbon steel blade for heavy duty scraping on walls, floors and other surfaces. Available in straight and bent head profiles. Shavehooks Ideal for scraping a wide range of flat, profiled and rounded surfaces as well as raking into tight spots such as corner joints. Made from rust-resistant, heavy duty 2mm thick ground steel, they are available in triangular and combination profiles. Mini scraper A 1.5" razor blade mounted in a sturdy head that is ideal for all those little tasks that come up in many jobs such as removing paint spots, adhesives and slight surface textures. Features a protective blade cap that enables safe storage in pockets so you can keep it close to hand.
